message:
fix(vdbe): use float comparison for boolean truthiness in opcodes and sql_and

SQLite defines truthiness as "non-zero numeric value", evaluated via
floating-point coercion.  The Not, If, and IfNot opcodes and the
sql_and helper were using to_integer(), which truncates values like 0.5
to 0 and incorrectly treats them as falsy.  Switch all four sites to
to_float() so that any non-zero numeric value (including fractional
values) is correctly recognised as truthy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
